system.notes: Replaces mechanical linkages with computer-mediated controls (Levels 1–3), trading Handling for Acceleration/Speed. Design cost = chassis Design Point cost × 1.75 per level; max −3 Handling. Parts cost = vehicle's original cost × the level; Avail 8/16 days; Street Index 2; needs B/R, Computer & Electronics. Rigger 2 p.124.
